text: 🔄 Forwarded from China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong: *Join Danny Haiphong LIVE today April 21st 12pm eastern 6pm CET w/ Sharmine Narwani!* Danny and Sharmine break down massive efforts by Iran to crush the US’s naval blockade as negotiations with the US completely collapse. They dive into the larger geopolitical headwinds in this war that are rapidly pushing the world back into a historic hot conflict with ramifications unseen in a century. Watch here: https://www.youtube.com/live/wMi04OuE8_U?si=n5yxAjG2QD2PPDRR
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong：*今天4月21日东部时间中午12点，欧洲中部时间下午6点，加入 Danny Haiphong 的直播，嘉宾是 Sharmine Narwani！* Danny 和 Sharmine 将深入剖析伊朗为粉碎美国海军封锁所做的巨大努力，此时与美国的谈判已彻底破裂。他们探讨了这场战争中更大的地缘政治逆风，这些逆风正迅速将世界推回一个世纪以来未见的具有历史性影响的热冲突中。观看地址：https://www.youtube.com/live/wMi04OuE8_U?si=n5yxAjG2QD2PPDRR

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "📸 Israeli soldier smashing a Jesus statue’s head in southern Lebanon." Israel says two IDF soldiers were "punished" after smashing a Jesus statue in Lebanon. Both were removed from combat and given 30 days detention. Six other soldiers present are under investigation.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“📸 以色列士兵在黎巴嫩南部砸毁耶稣雕像的头部。”以色列称两名以色列国防军士兵在黎巴嫩砸毁耶稣雕像后受到“惩罚”。两人均被调离战斗岗位，并被处以30天监禁。其他六名在场的士兵正在接受调查。

text: 🇷🇺 💥 🇺🇦 The strike on the home of "Flash" — a adviser to Ukraine's Defense Minister and specialist in electronic reconnaissance — marks a new phase in the conflict. Based on published photos, the hit appears to have been deliberate and targeted. Ukrainian sources confirm the drone was operated in online guidance mode, meaning someone was manually steering it to a specific address. In modern warfare, engineers, analysts, and technical specialists are increasingly becoming legitimate targets — until now, predominantly on the Russian side of the front. The strike on Beskrestny's home suggests this is now a two-way street. Russia appears to be beginning targeted elimination of key Ukrainian military technicians, using guided Geran drones and precise residential intelligence. Via: @sashakots 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💥 🇺🇦 对“Flash”——乌克兰国防部长顾问兼电子侦察专家——住所的袭击标志着冲突进入了新阶段。根据发布的照片，这次打击似乎是蓄意且有针对性的。乌克兰消息人士证实，该无人机是在在线引导模式下操作的，这意味着有人手动将其引导至特定地址。在现代战争中，工程师、分析师和技术专家正日益成为合法的打击目标——直到现在，这主要发生在俄罗斯方面。对 Beskrestny 住所的袭击表明，现在这已成为双向的。俄罗斯似乎开始利用制导的“天竺葵”（Geran）无人机和精确的住宅情报，对乌克兰关键军事技术人员进行定点清除。来源：@sashakots 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: GRAPHIC: Unarmed, limping Russian soldier end up being hit directly by Ukrainian drone, launching his body onto rooftop.
text_zh: 画面：一名手无寸铁、一瘸一拐的俄罗斯士兵被乌克兰无人机直接击中，身体被炸飞到屋顶上。

text: 🇷🇺 "We know how everything will end, but we will not make any public statements on that account, and will simply work toward and strive for the goals we have set for ourselves. I am certain they will be achieved." — Vladimir Putin, on the outcome of the special military operation. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 “我们知道一切将如何结束，但我们不会就此发表任何公开声明，只会朝着我们设定的目标努力奋斗。我相信这些目标一定会实现。”——弗拉基米尔·普京，谈及特别军事行动的结果。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Spain wants to suspend the EU–Israel agreement, accusing Israel of breaking international law. But the plan is likely to fail because “there is no broad consensus among the member states.” Key countries like Germany and Italy oppose it, stressing a “serious and balanced approach.” Even partial measures are stuck because the EU is deeply divided. Source: Euronews
text_zh: 西班牙希望暂停欧盟与以色列的协议，指责以色列违反国际法。但该计划很可能会失败，因为“成员国之间没有达成广泛共识”。德国和意大利等主要国家对此表示反对，强调要采取“严肃且平衡的方法”。即使是部分措施也陷入僵局，因为欧盟内部存在严重分歧。来源：Euronews

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 Kan: The Israeli military has identified the soldier who smashed a statue of Jesus in the southern Lebanese village of Debel. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 IDF announced that the Israeli soldier who smashed a statue of Jesus with a sledgehammer in southern Lebanon, along with another soldier who documented the act, have been removed from combat roles and sentenced to 30 days in jail. @wtwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 Kan：以色列军方已确认在黎巴嫩南部 Debel 村砸毁耶稣雕像的士兵身份。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列国防军宣布，那名在黎巴嫩南部用大锤砸毁耶稣雕像的以色列士兵，以及另一名记录该行为的士兵，已被调离战斗岗位，并被判处30天监禁。@wtwitness

text: A Mossad agent has been killed amid the ongoing war with Iran 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 ⚡️ David Barnea, the head of Mossad, announced that one of the agency's operatives was killed outside of Israel's borders during the war with Iran. Speaking at a memorial ceremony on Tuesday, he said the agent — known as "Mem" — was involved in the operation called "Roaring Lion" against Iran. This marks the first time Mossad has officially confirmed the death of one of its own operatives in the recent conflict with Iran. However, no details have been released about the agent's identity, or the exact time and place of the incident. A short statement from Mossad also said the agent played a key role in gathering intelligence and carrying out operations related to Iran's programs. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 一名摩萨德特工在与伊朗的持续战争中丧生 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 摩萨德负责人大卫·巴尼亚（David Barnea）宣布，该机构的一名特工在与伊朗的战争期间在以色列境外丧生。他在周二的追悼会上表示，这名被称为“Mem”的特工参与了针对伊朗的“咆哮狮子”（Roaring Lion）行动。这是摩萨德首次正式确认其特工在近期与伊朗的冲突中死亡。然而，有关该特工的身份或事件发生的具体时间和地点的细节尚未公布。摩萨德的一份简短声明还称，该特工在收集情报和执行与伊朗计划相关的行动中发挥了关键作用。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ЕВРОПАРЬ: 📝 Гибридная паника 📝 Продолжается бурление по поводу публикации Минобороны РФ со списком европейских компаний, причастных к производству компонентов для украинских дронов. На этот раз МИД Германии вызвал российского посла, объявив это «прямыми угрозами целям на территории ФРГ» и попыткой запугать страну и расколоть поддержку Киева. Дальше по канону: медиа, чиновники спецслужб и профильные ведомства аккуратно дорисовывают картинку до полной «гибридной войны» — со шпионажем, кибератаками, диверсиями и потенциальными ударами по инфраструктуре. Более того, руководители немецких оборонных компаний находятся в опасности «из-за угроз РФ». 🖍 При этом прямую военную атаку на немецкие компании спикеры практически исключают, делая упор на «рост риска диверсий и кибератак» . То есть речь идёт об угрозах, которые отлично укладываются в уже существующую риторику Берлина о «новой реальности безопасности». А ещё о тех самых заявлениях, которые никак не проверишь и к коим доказательств не публикуют, а если те вдруг появляются, то по итогу «атаки» оказываются фейками. 📌 На выходе получается удобная конструкция: гражданам настойчиво объясняют, что опасность тотальна и растёт , а ответ на неё один и тот же — больше спецслужб, больше ограничений и, конечно, ещё больше денег на оборону. В этом смысле информационная кампания вокруг «потенциальных целей» работает не только против Москвы, но и по собственному населению, которое нужно подготовить к тому, что за эту безопасность придётся платить именно ему. #Германия #Россия 👁 @evropar — на пороге смерти Европы 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ЕВРОПАРЬ：📝 混合恐慌 📝 关于俄罗斯国防部发布的一份涉及为乌克兰无人机生产零部件的欧洲公司名单，舆论持续发酵。这一次，德国外交部召见了俄罗斯大使，称此举是“对德国境内目标的直接威胁”，并试图恐吓该国并分裂对基辅的支持。接下来按照惯例：媒体、情报官员和相关部门小心翼翼地将画面描绘成一场全面的“混合战争”——包括间谍活动、网络攻击、破坏活动以及对基础设施的潜在打击。此外，德国国防公司的高管们因“俄罗斯的威胁”而处于危险之中。 🖍 与此同时，发言人几乎排除了对德国公司进行直接军事攻击的可能性，重点强调“破坏活动和网络攻击的风险增加”。也就是说，这些威胁完全符合柏林现有的关于“新安全现实”的论调。此外，还有那些无法核实且未公布证据的声明，如果证据突然出现，最终“攻击”往往被证明是伪造的。 📌 结果是一个方便的结构：向公民反复解释危险是全面的且在增长，而应对它的方法只有一个——更多的情报机构、更多的限制，当然还有更多的国防开支。从这个意义上说，围绕“潜在目标”的信息战不仅针对莫斯科，也针对本国人口，他们需要被告知必须为这种安全付出代价。 #德国 #俄罗斯 👁 @evropar — 在欧洲死亡的边缘 💸 支持我们

text: WATCH: Israel almost completely destroyed Bint Jbeil, Lebanon.
text_zh: 观看：以色列几乎完全摧毁了黎巴嫩的宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）。

text: Open Source Intel The United States is not going to the negotiation table with Iran. I don’t think we should call it “negotiations”. It’s more accurate to be honest and say it’s a pressure campaign the United States is imposing on Iran. The United States is forcing Iran to give up its nuclear program and open up the strait and many more. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：美国不会与伊朗进行谈判桌上的对话。我不认为我们应该称之为“谈判”。更准确、更诚实地说，这是美国强加给伊朗的一场压力运动。美国正在强迫伊朗放弃其核计划、开放海峡等等。推文

I think we'll get along with them just fine." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046588074495246842/video/1 tweet

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "NEW: Ukraine jokingly suggested naming part of the Donbas “Donnyland” (after Trump) during peace talks. The goal: Appeal to Trump’s ego and get stronger U.S. support against Russia. Source: NYT" Ukraine even made a fake “Donnyland” flag (green & gold) and anthem (via ChatGPT) as part of the idea.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“最新消息：乌克兰在和平谈判中开玩笑地建议将顿巴斯的一部分命名为‘唐纳德乐园’（Donnyland，以特朗普命名）。目标：迎合特朗普的虚荣心，并获得美国对俄罗斯更强有力的支持。来源：纽约时报” 乌克兰甚至制作了一个假的“唐纳德乐园”旗帜（绿色和金色）和国歌（通过 ChatGPT）作为该想法的一部分。

text: 🇺🇸 Elon and his Ukrainian-Zionist product lead Nikita Bier are suspending Iranian accounts left and right, while suppressing the reach of everyone else (including us) on the biggest "free speech" platform in the world. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸🏴‍☠️🇮🇷- US INDOPACOM forces conducted a right-of-visit boarding of the sanctioned VLCC tanker M/T TIFANI, via two MH-60S Seahawk helicopters in the Indian ocean between Sri Lanka and Indonesia, without incident. Kegbreath's Department of War and Piracy:…" 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 "We caught a ship yesterday that had some things on it that wasn't very nice. A gift from China perhaps, I don't know. But I was a little surprised, because I have a very good relationship and I thought I had an understanding with President Xi. But that's alright. That's the way war goes." - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸🏴‍☠️🇮🇷- 美国印太司令部部队通过两架 MH-60S 海鹰直升机，在斯里兰卡和印度尼西亚之间的印度洋上，对受制裁的超大型油轮 M/T TIFANI 进行了登船检查，过程未发生意外。Kegbreath 的战争与海盗部：……” 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 “我们昨天截获了一艘船，上面有一些不太好的东西。也许是中国送的礼物，我不知道。但我有点惊讶，因为我与习近平主席关系很好，我以为我们达成了谅解。但没关系。战争就是这样。” - 特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Muhammad Majdi al-Jaabari, 16 years old, from the occupied village of Bayt Anoun in Al-Khalil (Hebron), was murdered in cold blood this morning while riding his electric bicycle to school. A convoy belonging to Itamar Ben-Gvir ran him over near the Beit Einun junction. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 16岁的穆罕默德·马吉迪·贾巴里（Muhammad Majdi al-Jaabari）来自被占领的希伯伦（Al-Khalil）拜特阿农（Bayt Anoun）村，今天早上在骑电动自行车上学时被冷血谋杀。伊塔马尔·本-格维尔（Itamar Ben-Gvir）的车队在拜特艾农（Beit Einun）路口附近碾压了他。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: Bernie Sanders: We used to think oligarchy meant Russia—Putin and his wealthy friends. Well, guess what? We have oligarchs in the United States as well. Their power and control over the political system is undermining democracy. If the media supports me and billionaires fund me, you’re never going to beat me.
text_zh: 伯尼·桑德斯：我们过去认为寡头政治意味着俄罗斯——普京和他的富豪朋友们。好吧，猜猜怎么着？我们美国也有寡头。他们对政治体系的权力和控制正在破坏民主。如果媒体支持我，亿万富翁资助我，你就永远无法击败我。

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump says Iran has no choice but to send negotiators and that he expects a "great deal." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Contrary to what Trump and CNBC are saying, there has been no confirmation from Iran on attending the negotiations. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Bernie Sanders: Never before in history have so few people had so much wealth and so much power, and so much control over the media. The top 1% own more wealth than the bottom 93% in the U.S. One man—Elon Musk—owns more wealth than the bottom 53% of American households.
text_zh: 伯尼·桑德斯：历史上从未有过如此少的人拥有如此多的财富、如此大的权力和对媒体如此大的控制力。在美国，最富有的1%的人拥有的财富超过了底层93%的人。一个人——埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）——拥有的财富超过了美国底层53%家庭的总和。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Trump says Iran has no choice but to send negotiators and that he expects a "great deal." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普称伊朗别无选择，只能派遣谈判代表，并预计会达成一项“伟大的协议”。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Hegseth: We are discarding the mandatory flu vaccine requirement, effective immediately.
text_zh: 赫格塞斯（Hegseth）：我们正在取消强制流感疫苗接种要求，立即生效。

text: Trump: To the Iranian leaders, who will soon be in negotiations with my representatives: I would greatly appreciate the release of these women. I am sure that they will respect the fact that you did so. Please do them no harm! Would be a great start to our negotiations!!! Thank you for your attention to this matter.
text_zh: 特朗普：致伊朗领导人，你们很快将与我的代表进行谈判：我将非常感谢你们释放这些女性。我相信你们会尊重你们这样做的事实。请不要伤害她们！这将是我们谈判的一个良好开端！！！感谢你们对此事的关注。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iran Has Prepared New Surprises in Case War Resumes ▪️ According to information obtained by Tasnim News Agency journalist sources: as the agreed ceasefire period nears its final hours, and with U.S. “excessive demands” plus the announced naval blockade preventing renewed negotiations, Iran is fully prepared for the possibility of war restarting and has arranged new surprises for a potential new round of battle. ▪️ Based on reports, Iran has considered the likelihood of renewed war to be high over the past two weeks, and accordingly has carried out certain military redeployments and prepared a new target list for that scenario. ▪️ On that basis, Iran is ready to create another hell for Americans and Israelis from the very first second of any possible new war. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 如果战争重启，伊朗已准备好新的惊喜 ▪️ 根据塔斯尼姆通讯社（Tasnim News Agency）记者消息来源获得的信息：随着商定的停火期接近最后几个小时，加上美国的“过分要求”以及宣布的海上封锁阻碍了重新谈判，伊朗已为战争重启的可能性做好了充分准备，并为潜在的新一轮战斗安排了新的惊喜。 ▪️ 据报道，过去两周伊朗认为战争重启的可能性很高，因此进行了某些军事重新部署，并为该情景准备了新的目标清单。 ▪️ 在此基础上，伊朗已准备好在任何可能的新战争的第一秒起，就为美国人和以色列人创造另一个地狱。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: Putin on the Ukraine war: We know how it will all end. Victory will be ours—no one doubts that.
text_zh: 普京谈乌克兰战争：我们知道这一切将如何结束。胜利终将属于我们——这一点毋庸置疑。

text: Open Source Intel Trump: “To the Iranian leaders, who will soon be in negotiations with my representatives: I would greatly appreciate the release of these women. I am sure that they will respect the fact that you did so. Please do them no harm! Would be a great start to our negotiations! ! ! Thank you for your attention to this matter. President DONALD J. TRUMP” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：“致伊朗领导人，你们很快将与我的代表进行谈判：如果能释放这些女性，我将不胜感激。我相信你们如果这样做，会受到尊重。请不要伤害她们！这将是我们谈判的一个良好开端！！！感谢你们对此事的关注。唐纳德·J·特朗普总统” 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 US President Trump said he called on Iranian leaders to release detained women ahead of expected negotiations with US representatives, describing such a move as a positive start to talks. He urged that the women be treated without harm and said he would greatly appreciate their release. Trump added the gesture would be respected and thanked Iranian authorities for their attention to the matter. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，他已呼吁伊朗领导人在与美国代表进行预期谈判之前释放被拘留的女性，并将此举描述为会谈的积极开端。他敦促不要伤害这些女性，并表示如果她们获释，他将不胜感激。特朗普补充说，这一姿态将受到尊重，并感谢伊朗当局对此事的关注。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel IDF Givati Commander in Lebanon: Turns out the ceasefire in Lebanon worked out very well for us, once the ceasefire began, we were able to reach many places that were impossible to capture before the ceasefire began. Very interesting. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列国防军吉瓦提旅指挥官在黎巴嫩：事实证明，黎巴嫩的停火协议对我们非常有利，一旦停火开始，我们就能够到达许多在停火前无法占领的地方。非常有趣。 推文

text: Open Source Intel PRESIDENT TRUMP: "You want to see a bad stock market? Try blowing up the Middle East and then Europe and then they come for us, right?!" "The market's up. We're gonna be at 50,000. That's where we were just a little while ago when it started!" "And when I hit 50,000 on the DOW and 7,000 on the S&P I said well, I hate to do this to everybody but I'm gonna have to journey down to a place called Iran." "And make sure they don't have a nuclear weapon because they will blow up the world!" "And we're not gonna let that happen." "So I said to the people I said to my people, the world, gathered all these wonderful guys, Scott Bassett to the whole group Howard. They're all doing a good job. I said fellas. I got a little bad news for you, I'm gonna put a little wrinkle in your numbers." "Why sir? We're going down to a place called Iran and we're gonna make sure that they never have a nuclear weapon." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普总统：“你想看到糟糕的股市吗？试着炸毁中东，然后是欧洲，然后他们就会来找我们，对吧？！”“市场上涨了。我们将达到50,000点。就在不久前，当它开始时，我们就在那里！”“当我道琼斯指数达到50,000点，标普指数达到7,000点时，我说，好吧，我不想对大家这样做，但我不得不去一个叫伊朗的地方。”“并确保他们没有核武器，因为他们会炸毁世界！”“我们不会让这种情况发生。”“所以我对人们说，我对我的团队说，世界，聚集了所有这些很棒的人，斯科特·巴塞特，整个团队，霍华德。他们都做得很好。我对伙计们说。我给你们带来了一个坏消息，我要在你们的数字里加一点波折。”“为什么先生？我们要去一个叫伊朗的地方，我们要确保他们永远不会拥有核武器。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Joe Squawk : "You're saying that you need at least the prospects for a signed deal today and tomorrow or else you would resume bombing Iran?" Trump: "Well, I expect to be bombing because I think that's a better attitude to go in with, but we're ready to go." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046579029235359795/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 乔·斯卡伯勒：“你是说你今天和明天至少需要达成协议的前景，否则你就会恢复轰炸伊朗？” 特朗普：“嗯，我预计会进行轰炸，因为我认为这是一种更好的态度，但我们已经准备好了。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046579029235359795/video/1 推文
